title: Azura Client Essentials
description: A fine-tuned modpack built to improve the flow of your every-day experience with utility mods and client-optimizations
body:
**I know the modpack description might have just sounded like a fancy way of saying that this was just another optimization modpack, but the effort that has been put onto this modpack is truly worth your time, and.. a waste of my time.**

If you know anything about modding, this modpack will almost certainly be the perfect choice for you! We have all the essential mods you likely only want, would regularly use, and overall would find very helpful! And also, for your convenience, many of the mods are pre-configured to provide a hassle-free experience for every user of this modpack!

### 🎯 And for those who like to use the [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod, I have a seperate pack just for them [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/azura-client-essentials+)

‎ 
## Additional features (On top of Client Necessities)
- 🎙️ Voice chat
- 📹 Replay Mod
- 🪄 OptiFine features
- 🌍 Host worlds to friends
- 🖼️ Screenshot-gallery ingame
- 🔧 Various QoL improvements and fixes
- 🏞️ Unlimited render distance on servers
- 📔 Browse resourcepacks and shaders ingame
- 🖥️ Play Minecraft in a borderless fullscreen window

‎ 
### Included OptiFine mods:
- Animatica
- CIT Resewn
- Continuity
- Entity Model Features
- Entity Sound Features
- Entity Texture Features
- FabricSkyboxes
- FabricSkyboxes Interop
- MoreMcmeta
- MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures
- OptiGUI
- Polytone

‎ 
> 🪶 For a lighter modpack with a **smaller set of utility mods**, check [Client Necessities](https://modrinth.com/modpack/client-necessities)
